heroSlides.descriptionEn: Thoughtful reviews, trusted ratings, and cinema worth talking about.
heroSlides.descriptionTr: Özenli incelemeler, güvenilir puanlar ve konuşmaya değer filmler.

heroSlides.descriptionEn: Independent criticism and sharp curation for curious movie lovers.
heroSlides.descriptionTr: Meraklı sinemaseverler için bağımsız eleştiri ve güçlü seçkiler.

heroSlides.descriptionEn: Hidden gems, bold debuts, and films that deserve a wider audience.
heroSlides.descriptionTr: Saklı cevherler, cesur ilk filmler ve daha geniş bir seyirciyi hak eden yapımlar.

movie.synopsis: A linguist on a silent orbital station receives a message that appears to be from Earth, forty years in the future.
movie.title: The Last Signal

reviews.author: Maya Ellis
reviews.excerpt: A precise, atmospheric triumph. The Last Signal turns its ambitious premise into a richly observed story about the choices that define us.
reviews.body: The Last Signal understands that spectacle only matters when it reveals character. Director Mara Voss builds the film with unusual patience, allowing silence, framing, and small gestures to carry as much weight as its largest moments. The result feels both immediately accessible and worthy of a second viewing.
